summary: P2 Recommended Action Hero on Mission Dashboard fully verified end-to-end. Backend endpoint /api/cortex/mission-dashboard/recommended-action returns correct unified card (source='bridge', confidence=95, bridge_id, recommendation plan card), requires auth, skips bridges already in cortex_dismissed_plans, and falls back cleanly. Frontend hero renders with all required testids; Loading skeleton, Launch (override_autonomy=3 + recommendation payload), Discuss (prefill + URL cleared), and Dismiss (POST /cortex/plan/cancel + toast + hide) CTAs all working. has_recommendation=false correctly hides the hero entirely.
critical_code_review_comments: test_recommended_action.py reads REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL but pytest runs in the backend process where only backend/.env is auto-loaded; added a fallback that parses /app/frontend/.env so tests work in both shells. Consider adding REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to backend/.env or a tests/conftest.py for cleaner DI in future iterations.

/api/cortex/plan/cancel writes to cortex_dismissed_plans using the bridge id as rec_id — verified by intercepting the dismiss POST. Make sure get_recommended_action's _bridge_consumed check uses the same key shape (it does: rec_id == bridge.id).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all flows: hero render, launch, discuss prefill, dismiss, hidden-on-no-rec)

seed_data_creation: None. Test inserts into cortex_dismissed_plans with reason='TEST_*' are removed by their own fixtures. The live Dismiss-flow E2E inserted a real dismissal for bridge c93cf0ed... which was manually cleaned up so the next agent still sees the high-confidence bridge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest: cd /app/backend && pytest tests/test_recommended_action.py -v. The endpoint, all three CTAs, prefill query stripping, loading skeleton lifecycle, and has_recommendation=false hidden state were all verified. If you re-run dismiss flow against the live API, remember to clean up cortex_dismissed_plans for user_test1779636592168 / rec_id=<bridge_id> afterwards or the bridge will be skipped on subsequent calls.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. Only minor test-infra adjustment needed (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL not exported to backend pytest env; resolved in test file).
